title: hyptis lutescens
intro: Hyptis lutescens, also known as yellow peppermint or false pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hyptis lutescens include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. Hyptis lutescens can be prepared as teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable herbal remedy in many cultures.
